programStartPrompt:
Welcome to the gemini cli application.
Press 1 for new stateless chat
2 to list AI Models
3 to get AI Model details
4 to initiate one time conversation
5 to initiate manually managed chat via generate content api
6 To list the conversations done by generate content api
7 To retrieve and continue existing conversation
8 To delete a conversation
generateContentUserPrompt:
Note: This is a one time conversation with the model.
Ask Anything..
askStatelessConvTopicUserPrompt: Please provide the topic for this conversationn
selectConversationListUserPrompt: select conversation for displaying entire conversation history
deleteConversationListUserPrompt: select conversation to delete it permanently
continueChatUserPrompt:
Hello, Please continue your conversation.
Ask Anything..
askAiModelNameForDetailsUserPrompt: please provide the model name for details
